terms.definition: The degree to which parts of a system hold together in mutually reinforcing, coordinated alignment
A scalar index (0–1) representing a civilization’s overall coherence level
Exogenous restorative input that counter-acts entropy-driven decay of social coherence
Rate at which internal entropy erodes coherence in the absence of restorative input
Tendency of socio-cultural order to decay into disorder when not actively maintained
The χ value (empirically ~0.35) below which self-reinforcing decay dominates and above which recovery is possible
